criteria.name: watcher_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies watcher/mod.rs as the file change detection module
criteria.groundTruth: src/watcher/mod.rs uses the notify crate to watch filesystem events

criteria.name: chunker_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies tree-sitter chunking in engine/
criteria.groundTruth: src/engine/ uses tree-sitter grammars to split files into semantic chunks

criteria.name: embedder_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies the Embedder trait and at least one provider
criteria.groundTruth: src/embedder/mod.rs defines the Embedder trait, with implementations in onnx.rs, gemini.rs, ollama.rs, openai.rs

criteria.name: store_identified
criteria.groundTruth: src/store/mod.rs manages rusqlite with sqlite-vec extension for vector storage
